title: Website Digides
description: Website Digides merupakan sistem layanan administrasi desa digital yang dibangun menggunakan modern admin template Velzon untuk menghadirkan tampilan profesional dan responsif, dengan dukungan Laravel 12, MySQL, dan JavaScript (AJAX).

title: Sistem Informasi Arsip Persuratan
description: Sistem informasi berbasis web untuk pengelolaan arsip surat masuk dan keluar secara terpusat, mendukung disposisi, pelacakan, dan pencarian arsip cepat.

title: Payment System - Java Spring Boot Personal Project
description: Enterprise payment application demonstrating modern Java development practices with Spring Boot framework.

title: Banking System - Java Spring Boot Personal Project
description: Comprehensive banking application showcasing enterprise-level Java development with desktop and API integration.

title: Golang REST API - Book Store Personal Project
description: Comprehensive Book Store REST API built with GoFiber framework demonstrating modern Go development patterns.

title: Go Online Shop - E-commerce API Personal Project
description: E-commerce application built with GoFiber featuring complete online shop business logic and REST API endpoints.
